hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: These Terms explain the rules for using HEIC JPG NOW. We keep the language clear so you can understand how to use the service safely and fairly.

sections.title: 1. Scope
body: These Terms apply to all features we provide on heicjpgnow.com and related domains. By using any feature on the site, you agree to these Terms.
list: If you are under the age of majority, please use the service with consent from a parent or legal guardian.
If any clause conflicts with mandatory law, that law prevails and the remaining clauses stay in effect.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility and Use
body: You are responsible for the files you upload or process, and you confirm that you have the necessary rights to use them.
list: The service is free for personal and commercial use, as long as usage stays reasonable and does not overload the system.
If your company or organization plans to integrate the tool into an internal workflow, please contact us in advance.

sections.title: 3. Prohibited Conduct
body: You must not do any of the following.
list: Reverse-engineer, modify, copy, redistribute, or resell the service or related code.
Run automated scripts at a scale that causes excessive load on our servers or network.
Uploading files that infringe copyrights, trademarks, privacy rights, or other third-party rights.
Using the service for unlawful, harmful, or otherwise abusive purposes.

sections.title: 4. Content and Intellectual Property
body: Copyrights, trademarks, and other intellectual property rights in the site's logos, design, code, and documentation belong to HEIC JPG NOW or the relevant rights holders. You keep rights to your own content and grant us permission to process it only as needed to provide the service.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimers
body: Conversions run in your browser, so results may vary based on your device, browser, and network environment. We are not liable for:
list: The accuracy, completeness, or fitness of conversion results, or loss of uploaded files.
Damage arising from unauthorized access, malware, force majeure, or third-party services.
Disputes between users or between a user and a third party.
notes: These limitations do not apply if damage is caused by our intentional misconduct or gross negligence.

sections.title: 6. Service Changes
body: We may change, suspend, or discontinue features, including third-party integrations, for reasons such as security, legal compliance, and operational needs.
When changes are significant, we will provide advance notice on the website whenever reasonably possible.

sections.title: 7. Suspension and Liability
body: If you violate these Terms, we may suspend access, block use, or seek damages without prior notice. You are responsible for losses and costs caused by your violation.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law & Contact
body: These Terms are interpreted in accordance with the laws applicable to our operations.
If you have questions about these Terms, data handling, or third-party services, please contact us using the details below.
list: We may use third-party services to operate and improve the website. For details on data handling, please also review our Privacy Policy.
We usually reply within 3 business days.
